mapper.sql: slot_id, contest_id, slot_date, start_time, end_time, venue, capacity, booked_count, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag
mapper.select: select from jst_appointment_slot where slot_id = #{slotId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select from jst_appointment_slot where contest_id = #{contestId} and del_flag = '0' order by slot_date asc, start_time asc, slot_id asc
mapper.update: update jst_appointment_slot set slot_date = #{entity.slotDate}, start_time = #{entity.startTime}, end_time = #{entity.endTime}, venue = #{entity.venue}, capacity = #{entity.capacity}, booked_count = #{entity.bookedCount}, status = #{entity.status}, update_by = #{entity.updateBy}, update_time = #{entity.updateTime} where slot_id = #{entity.slotId} and del_flag = '0'
update jst_appointment_slot set booked_count = booked_count + #{increment}, update_time = now() where slot_id = #{slotId} and del_flag = '0' and status = 1 and capacity >= booked_count + #{increment}
mapper.select: select from jst_appointment_slot where contest_id = #{contestId} and status = 1 and del_flag = '0' order by slot_date asc, start_time asc, slot_id asc
